'''鈭歬-y-zh-th''' ('''kakayzhethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chapter|chapter]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-y-zh-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chapter|chapter]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-y-zh-th
|-
! Lemma
| kakayzhethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikayzhethoko|thikayzhethoko]] || [[word:jikayzhethoko|jikayzhethoko]] || [[word:shikayzhethoko|shikayzhethoko]] || [[word:kikayzhethoko|kikayzhethoko]]
